title: rhodolirium montanum
intro: Rhodolirium montanum, also known as Rhodiola rosea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. It is commonly referred to as the "golden root" and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rhodiola rosea include stress relief, improved mental performance, and enhanced mood, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce fatigue. Rhodiola rosea can be prepared as a dietary supplement in the form of capsules, tablets, or powders, or it can be consumed as a tea, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its effects.
